issues.comment: Dead code: Lines 115-116 create two ASN1Encoder instances, write rBigInteger and sBigInteger into them, and immediately discard the results. The actual encoding is done by fresh encoders on lines 118-122. These are leftover debug/development lines that perform wasted computation (creating two ASN1Encoder objects, two ByteArrayOutputStream objects, and encoding two BigInteger values) on every ECDSA signature conversion.
